scenarios.description: After initial child(0) caches shadowChildrenRef, appending a new element invalidates cache and child(1) returns the new element
scenarios.precondition: parent has one Element child and shadowChildrenRef is populated
scenarios.expectedResult: child(1) returns the newly appended second Element
pseudocode: TEST TC09 cache invalidation after mutation

scenarios.description: child(1) on element with interleaved TextNode, DataNode, Element, TextNode, Element returns the second Element
scenarios.precondition: parent has mixed childNodes: TextNode, DataNode, Element first, TextNode, Element second
scenarios.expectedResult: child(1) returns the second Element, skipping non-Element nodes
pseudocode: TEST TC10 mixed-node filtering for child index
